title: elaeoselinum polygamum
intro: Elaeoselinum polygamum, also known as Chinese Angelica or Qian hu, is a plant species within the carrot family, Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory, cardiovascular, and gastrointestinal disorders. E. polygamum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
